basic_details.job_title: PAU Young Professional-II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) Young Professional-II Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Punjab Agricultural University. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the PAU Young Professional-II Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation in any discipline with minimum 60% marks, M.Sc. Agricultural Economics/M.Sc. Economics/M.A. Economics with minimum 65% marks, Ph.D. in relevant discipline (alternative)
qualification.details: Young Professional-II: Graduation in any discipline with minimum OCPA of 6.00/10.00 basis or 60% marks and M.Sc. Agricultural Economics/M.Sc. Economics/M.A. Economics with minimum OCPA of 6.50/10.00 or 65% marks. Ph.D. in relevant discipline shall be eligible if Master's degree not possessed.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for PAU Young Professional-II Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://pau.edu.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download PAU Young Professional-II Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.punjab_agricultural_university_pau: Graduation in any discipline with minimum 60% marks, M.Sc. Agricultural Economics/M.Sc. Economics/M.A. Economics with minimum 65% marks, Ph.D. in relevant discipline (alternative)

content_sections.heading: PAU Young Professional-II Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the PAU Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download PAU Young Professional-II Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: PAU Young Professional-II Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Young Professional-II: Graduation in any discipline with minimum OCPA of 6.00/10.00 basis or 60% marks and M.Sc. Agricultural Economics/M.Sc. Economics/M.A. Economics with minimum OCPA of 6.50/10.00 or 65% marks. Ph.D. in relevant discipline shall be eligible if Master's degree not possessed.

content_sections.heading: PAU Young Professional-II Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: PAU Young Professional-II Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for PAU Young Professional-II Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://pau.edu. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: PAU Young Professional-II Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PAU Young Professional-II recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the PAU Young Professional-II position is 20th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Young Professional-II post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Graduation in any discipline with minimum 60% marks or M.Sc. in Agricultural Economics/Economics with minimum 65% marks. A Ph.D. in a relevant discipline is also acceptable if a Master's degree is not possessed.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Young Professional-II position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Young Professional-II post is between 21 years and 45 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional-II role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Young Professional-II position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 35,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the PAU Young Professional-II recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline. Download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it via post to the address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the PAU Young Professional-II recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories is Rs. 200/-.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Young Professional-II position is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Punjab Agricultural University: https://pau.edu.

faq.question: Q10. What is the interview date for the Young Professional-II post?
faq.answer: The interview for the Young Professional-II post is scheduled to be held on 27th July 2026.
